  1. recoder.util

Uses of Package
recoder.util

Packages that use recoder.util
Package
Description
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.abstraction
This package contains the meta model abstractions as used by the semantical services.
recoder.convenience
The convenience layer contains auxiliary functions that are useful in the context of RECODER.
recoder.io
The io package provides classes to import and export source and class files.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.
recoder.util
This package provides basic data types and algorithms.
  • Classes in recoder.util used by recoder
    Class
    Description
    Equality
    This interface defines an equality relation between two objects.
    HashCode
    This interface defines a function mapping objects to integer values.
    Order
    This interface defines two order relation between objects.
    Order.CustomLexicalOrder
    Custom lexical order implementation comparing objects by comparison of a unicode string mapping.

    A progress listener listens to process events issued by algorithms.
